name: Conditus
short_description: Show your friends who's the strongest ninja, and make them suffer. Or team up with them to eliminate your enemies.
detailed_description:
Have you ever got into an argument with your friends on who would be the best ninja, of course you have! In this game you can set an end to that argument and show your friends the sword in a mystic temple. You can either go out with full force and kill everyone in your path or you can go with stealth-mode and take out your enemies quieter and smoother.

Play up to 10 players in 2 teams (Team Red and Team Blue). Currently only in one gamemode!

Win matches to level up and unlock better movements and quicker attacks to become a better ninja.

Combine your own combo set to achieve a unique attackstyle.

The waiting time for matchmaking can be very long if you try to find random people, so I recommend playing with your friends.
